rows.description: By Dr. Shortridge's Trustees one years Rent (Charges to Xtmas 1837)
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy over `gpt-5-mini`, which had significant discrepancies.

Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy over `gpt-5-mini`, which had significant discrepancies and lower confidence. Visual inspection confirms amounts as 5 18 8.

rows.description: By The Receiver Interim = to Dimes to Mid 1837. 428
rows.notes: `gemini-flash`'s extraction was chosen for both description and amounts. Its note correctly observed the pounds column was empty and '428' was part of the description text, which was verified visually. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly placed '428' in the pounds column and had a significantly different description.

rows.description: By Do. from Office of Biblect
rows.notes: `gemini-flash`'s extraction was chosen. Visually, the amount is £1 s6 d8. `gemini-flash`'s note correctly identified a faint '7' after the pence digit but dismissed it as not a standard fraction, showing careful reasoning. `gpt-5-mini` read 16 shillings and 7 pence incorrectly and also had a less accurate description ('Whitlock' instead of 'Biblect').

rows.description: One fourth of improved Rent from Pickford (Norris & Swain, Due to Mich. 1834)
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy over `gpt-5-mini`, which was significantly truncated and contained errors (e.g., 'Ridford' instead of 'Pickford').

rows.description: By Do. from Medenhain to Xtmas 1836
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy, particularly 'Xtmas' which is a more accurate transcription of the abbreviation than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Mars'.

rows.description: By Mr. Reaton & Intintula, Mr. Snowden (fees for the Lease of his Estate)
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy and completeness over `gpt-5-mini`, which contained significant uncertainties and errors.

rows.description: By Mr. Day on the Library Rent (as part of Mr. Snowdon's Bill)
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy and completeness, capturing specific names ('Mr. Day', 'Mr. Snowdon's Bill') where `gpt-5-mini` had uncertainties.

rows.description: Reimbursement to Durned from L. Bewington (Rents - 1/2 years to XDay 1837)
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected; its transcription of 'Durned', 'L. Bewington', and 'XDay' is a better visual match to the faded script than `gpt-5-mini`'s, although both extractors noted some uncertainty in the description.

rows.description: By Mr. Dayman Bursar, Incrementum to Midr. 1838
rows.notes: Visual verification confirmed amounts as £840 s5 d10. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read shillings as '6'. `gemini-flash`'s description, particularly 'Bursar', was also a more accurate visual match.
Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected; 'Biblect' is a better visual match to the script than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Billets'.

rows.description: By Mr. Dawson Dean's Fees 1 3/4 to Midr. 1838
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected; '1 3/4 to Midr. 1838' is a visually more accurate transcription than `gpt-5-mini`'s, and `gemini-flash`'s note correctly clarifies '1 3/4' as part of the descriptive text.

Visual verification confirmed amounts as £1755 s7 d6. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read shillings as '4'. The description is a direct transcription of the total amount and its preceding 'L' symbol, which `gemini-flash` did not provide as literal text but implied 'Summa'.
